crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: MALWARE-CNC Possible host infection - excessive DNS queries for .ru
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert udp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET 53 ( msg:"MALWARE-CNC Possible host infection - excessive DNS queries for .ru"; flow:to_server,no_stream; byte_test:1,!&,0xF8,2; content:"|02|ru|00|",fast_pattern,nocase; detection_filter:track by_src,count 100,seconds 10; service:dns; classtype:trojan-activity; sid:21545; rev:4; )

attributes.magic: PE32 executable (GUI) Intel 80386, for MS Windows

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects modification of autostart extensibility point (ASEP) in registry.
